text:
There was an island populated entirely by talking animals.

They were all very social creatures.

Once the biggest talking frog, Orion was getting tired of talking about how much he loved rainbows. Every time he saw one, he'd hop over to it.

One day Orion saw a beautiful new rainbow arching in the sky. He hopped over and hung out beside it for hours. Once it faded, he just hung around talking to other animals about it.

One day a little bird asked Orion what he got out of all these visits.

Orion explained, "I'm getting tired of just talking. I want something more."

A wise old bear said, "Well, perhaps you could talk to yourself. Seems like you already have a good conversation partner." 

Orion thought about this for a while and decided the idea might work. He made himself some small stuffed animal companions. They sat everywhere talking incessantly.
